[ART IS MINE!! POSTED ON TUMBLR <3]

Paranoia comfort

It hadn't been the same for D3rlord ever since... that incident. It was like he was losing the sense of reality every minute of his life. Though with you by his side... maybe he can still manage it. But it wasn't like it was gone completely. He started seeing things. Seeing things he shouldn't. Which terrifies him considering he doesn't know which is real and which isn't. Every time you tried pointing out it was all his imagination, something in his mind just... doubts it. He didn't want to make you worried yet, he can't help himself. These emotions were deep buried into him, and there was no way digging it out. Now he can't even spend a good Holiday with you...

✧─── ・ 。゚★: .✦ . :★. ───✧
